---
title: "fish_pass"
author: "Mike Allen"
date: "12/7/2021"
output: html_document
---
# Packages
Load packages, functions, & data; format data
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(wesanderson)
library(lubridate)
source("scripts/plot_by_tag_function.R")
source("scripts/plot_by_antenna_function.R")
source("scripts/fishsum_function.R")
`%notin%` <- Negate(`%in%`)

# read in tagging data
tags <- read.csv("other/tagging_data_11_2_21.csv") %>%
  filter(Tag.Number != "No Tag Number",
         Tag.Number != "-") %>%
  mutate(tag_short = str_sub(Tag.Number, - 9, - 1),
         tag_time = mdy_hm(Date.and.Time, tz = "America/New_York"))

# Compile receiver data
# Data are compiled, filtered, and cleaned within these scripts. Anthony should review to ensure all filtering was OK.
source("scripts/compile_pings_2012.R")
source("scripts/compile_pings_2013.R")
source("scripts/compile_pings_2014.R")
source("scripts/compile_pings_2015.R")
source("scripts/compile_pings_2016.R")
source("scripts/compile_pings_2017.R")
source("scripts/compile_pings_2018.R")
source("scripts/compile_pings_2019.R")

# Extracting & summarizing fish tag data
fish2012_sum <- fishsum(data2012)
fish2013_sum <- fishsum(data2013)
fish2014_sum <- fishsum(data2014)
fish2015_sum <- fishsum(data2015)
fish2016_sum <- fishsum(data2016)
fish2017_sum <- fishsum(data2017)
fish2018_sum <- fishsum(data2018)
fish2019_sum <- fishsum(data2019)
fish_sum <- fish2019_sum %>%
  bind_rows(fish2018_sum, fish2017_sum, fish2016_sum,
            fish2015_sum, fish2014_sum, fish2013_sum, 
            fish2012_sum) %>%
  arrange(year, Common.Name, tag_time)

# write fish summary csv files for review
# write.csv(fish_sum, "output/fish_sum.csv", row.names = F)

# remove unneeded objects
rm(fish2019_sum, fish2018_sum, fish2017_sum, fish2016_sum,
            fish2015_sum, fish2014_sum, fish2013_sum, 
            fish2012_sum)

# subset target species and create 1/0 passage variable (did the fish reach A4)
f <- tags %>%
  select(tag_short, Common.Name, tag_time) %>%
  filter(Common.Name %in% c("American Shad",
                            "River Herring",
                            "Blueback Herring")) %>%
  left_join(select(fish_sum, year, tag_short, first_ping_A4), by = "tag_short") %>%
  filter(!duplicated(tag_short)) %>% # remove 3 duplicates (inter-year returns)
  mutate(passage = case_when(is.na(first_ping_A4) ~ 0,
                               TRUE ~ 1),
         year = as.factor(case_when(is.na(year) ~ year(tag_time),
                          TRUE ~ year)),
         year_num = as.numeric(as.factor(year)),
         year_char = paste0("y", year),
         sp = as.factor(case_when(grepl(Common.Name, pattern = "Herring") ~
                          "Herring",
                        TRUE ~ "Shad")))

shad_df <- f %>%
  filter(Common.Name == "American Shad")

herring_df <- f %>%
  filter(grepl(Common.Name, pattern = "Herring"))

# examine shad data
shad_raw_sum <- cbind.data.frame(
  trials = aggregate(shad_df$passage, 
                     by = list(shad_df$year), length),
  successes = aggregate(shad_df$passage, 
                        by = list(shad_df$year), sum)[,2],
  prop = aggregate(shad_df$passage, by = list(shad_df$year), mean)[,2]
  ) %>%
  mutate(year = as.numeric(as.character(trials.Group.1)),
         species = "American Shad") %>%
  select(-trials.Group.1)

# examine herring data
herring_raw_sum <- cbind.data.frame(
  trials = aggregate(herring_df$passage, 
                     by = list(herring_df$year), length),
  successes = aggregate(herring_df$passage, 
                        by = list(herring_df$year), sum)[,2],
  prop = aggregate(herring_df$passage, by = list(herring_df$year), mean)[,2]
  ) %>%
  mutate(year = as.numeric(as.character(trials.Group.1)),
         species = "Herring spp.") %>%
  select(-trials.Group.1)

raw_sum <- rbind(shad_raw_sum, herring_raw_sum)

shad_data <- list(
  D = 1,
  N = nrow(filter(f, Common.Name == "American Shad")),
  L = length(unique(filter(f, Common.Name == "American Shad")$year)),
  y = filter(f, Common.Name == "American Shad")$passage,
  ll = as.numeric(as.factor(filter(f, Common.Name == "American Shad")$year)),
  x = rbind(rep(1, nrow(filter(f, Common.Name == "American Shad"))))
)

# Format fish data for "passage proportion" analysis

# combine raw data summaries
both <- rbind(shad_raw_sum, herring_raw_sum) %>%
  select(N = trials.x, z = successes, -prop, year) %>%
  mutate(year = as.numeric(as.factor(year)),
         fish = c(rep(1,7), rep(2,8)),
         fishyears = 1:15) #%>%
  #bind_rows(data.frame(N=0,z = 0,year = 7, fish = 1))

nfishyears <- 15
nyears <- 8
nfish <- 2

# bundle data for jags
fish_jags_data <- list(
  nfish = nfish,
  nfishyears = nfishyears,
  z = both$z,
  N = both$N,
  c = both$fish
)
```
# Export cleaned, compiled data for inspection
```{r}
write.csv(data2012, 
          "output/2012_clean_detection_data.csv", row.names=F)
write.csv(data2013, 
          "output/2013_clean_detection_data.csv", row.names=F)
write.csv(data2014, 
          "output/2014_clean_detection_data.csv", row.names=F)
write.csv(data2015, 
          "output/2015_clean_detection_data.csv", row.names=F)
write.csv(data2016, 
          "output/2016_clean_detection_data.csv", row.names=F)
write.csv(data2017, 
          "output/2017_clean_detection_data.csv", row.names=F)
write.csv(data2018, 
          "output/2018_clean_detection_data.csv", row.names=F)
write.csv(data2019, 
          "output/2019_clean_detection_data.csv", row.names=F)
```
# Plot pings by tag to identify which belong to fish
```{r}
# plot pings by tag number to check and identify fish
plot_by_tag(data2012)
plot_by_tag(data2013)
plot_by_tag(data2014)
plot_by_tag(data2015)
plot_by_tag(data2016)
plot_by_tag(data2017)
plot_by_tag(data2018)
plot_by_tag(data2019)
```
# Plot pings by tag to identify which belong to fish
```{r}
plot_by_antenna(data2012)
plot_by_antenna(data2013)
plot_by_antenna(data2014)
plot_by_antenna(data2015)
plot_by_antenna(data2016)
plot_by_antenna(data2017)
plot_by_antenna(data2018)
plot_by_antenna(data2019)
```
# JAGS model for fish passage proportion
Hyperparameters for both omega[c] and kappa[c]
```{r}

cat(file = "scripts/eight_coins_two_mints_hyperkappa.txt",
"
model{
for(s in 1:nfishyears){
  z[s] ~ dbin(theta[s], N[s])
  theta[s] ~ dbeta( omega[c[s]]*(kappa[c[s]]-2 )+1 ,
                    (1-omega[c[s]])*(kappa[c[s]]-2)+1)
}  

for( c in 1:nfish){
omega[c] ~ dbeta( omega0*(kappa0-2)+1,
                  (1-omega0)*(kappa0-2)+1 )
kappa[c] <- kappaMinusTwo[c] + 2
kappaMinusTwo[c] ~ dgamma(S0, R0) 

}

omega0 ~ dbeta(1.0, 1.0)
kappa0 <- kappaMinusTwo0 + 2
kappaMinusTwo0 ~ dgamma(0.01, 0.01) # mean=1, sd = 10

S0 ~ dgamma(0.01, 0.01)
R0 ~ dgamma(0.01, 0.01)
}
"
)

fish_mod <- jagsUI::jags(data = fish_jags_data,
             model.file = "scripts/eight_coins_two_mints_hyperkappa.txt",
             n.iter = 60000, n.burnin = 50000,
             parameters.to.save = c("theta", "omega"),
             n.chains = 3, parallel = T, n.thin = 10,
             inits = function()list(omega =
                                      c(rnorm(1,.45,.01),
                                        rnorm(1,.1,.01)),
                                    kappaMinusTwo = c(rnorm(1,20,.1),
                                                      rnorm(1,10,.1))
             ))
# saveRDS(fish_mod, "other/output/fish_jags_mod_hyperkappa_012322f.rds")
# fish_mod <- readRDS("other/output/fish_jags_mod_hyperkappa_012322f.rds")
fish_mod
dev.new(); plot(fish_mod)
thetas <- tidybayes::gather_draws(fish_mod, theta[i]) %>%
  group_by(i) %>%
  summarise(theta_mean = mean(.value),
            theta_q2.5 = quantile(.value, .025),
            theta_q97.5 = quantile(.value, .975),
            theta_q10 = quantile(.value, .1),
            theta_q90 = quantile(.value, .9)) %>%
  mutate(year = c(2012:2017,2019,2012:2019),
         species = c(rep("American Shad", 7), rep("Herring spp.", 8))) %>%
  left_join(raw_sum) 

omegas <- tidybayes::gather_draws(fish_mod, omega[i]) %>%
  group_by(i) %>%
  summarise(omega_mean = mean(.value),
            omega_q2.5 = quantile(.value, .025),
            omega_q97.5 = quantile(.value, .975),
            omega_q10 = quantile(.value, .1),
            omega_q90 = quantile(.value, .9)) %>%
  mutate(species = c("American Shad", "Herring spp."))


thetas %>%
  ggplot() +
    geom_vline(data = omegas, aes(xintercept = omega_mean), size = 0.5,
             color = "red") +
      geom_vline(data = omegas, aes(xintercept = omega_q2.5), size = 0.5,
             color = "red", lty = 2) +
        geom_vline(data = omegas, aes(xintercept = omega_q97.5), size = 0.5,
             color = "red", lty = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = theta_q2.5,
                    xmax = theta_q97.5,
                    y = year), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = theta_q10,
                    xmax = theta_q90,
                    y = year), size = 1, width = 0) +
  geom_point(aes(x = theta_mean,
                 y = year), size = 4) +
  facet_wrap(~species) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,1.1),
                     breaks = seq(0,1,0.2)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = 2012:2019) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14)) +
  labs(y = "", x = "Passage rate") +
  geom_point(aes(x = prop, y = year), shape = "x", 
            color = "red", size = 4) +
  geom_text(aes(x = 1, y = year, label = trials.x), nudge_x = .04,
            color = "darkgray") +
  annotate("text", x = .94, y = 2019, label = "n =", color = "darkgray")

ggsave("other/figures/successful_jags_run_hyperkappa6.png", 
       width = 7, heigh = 5, dpi = 400)
#to do: 
#1 add species means
#2 add raw proportions
#3 add sample size

```

# Video time series 
```{r}
library(readxl)
v <- read_xlsx("other/2 IFW Video Data Golden Master 11_2_21.xlsx",
               sheet = "Grouped") %>%
  select(Date, species = Species) %>%
  mutate(year = year(Date)) %>%
  group_by(species, year) %>%
  tally() %>%
  filter(species %in% c("American Shad", "River Herring spp."))

# Next up: add "i" info into the v object so it can be joined to thetas for multiplication

v %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_line(aes(x = year, y = n, color = species))

```
# Match up year time series with 

```{r}

fish_mod <- readRDS("other/output/fish_jags_mod_hyperkappa_012322f.rds")
fish_mod

thetas <- tidybayes::gather_draws(fish_mod, theta[i]) %>%
  mutate(year = case_when(i %in% c()))
```
